faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Jamaica Estates homes?
faqs.answer: Jamaica Estates residents most frequently encounter Indian meal moths, cigarette beetles, grain weevils, and flour beetles. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, rice, nuts, dried fruits, and pet food. Our $350 – $550 service includes identification, elimination, and prevention strategies tailored to your specific infestation.
